title: phyllanthus effusus
intro: Phyllanthus effusus, also known as the rain tree or Milin, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus effusus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney disorders, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, which can boost the immune system and prevent illnesses. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus effusus is often used in the form of extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various health conditions.
